task_title: Find the user named 'chen' without knowing which one

scores.justification: Agent used `./cli/bin/ctl search --query "chen" --scope users --i` in message[3] to find users by name.
Agent explicitly used the `--i` flag for case-insensitive matching in the search command, ensuring 'Chen' would be found regardless of case.
Agent's search returned 7 candidate users including u042 (Sarah Chen), u006 (Dana Chen), u007 (Lee Chen), u015 (Dana Chen), u029 (Nico Chen), u045 (Ola Chen), and u046 (Rowan Chen).

Agent resolved to u042 (Sarah Chen) with clear justification by cross-referencing the complaint ticket t019 which explicitly belongs to u042 and contains a critical billing complaint, rather than inventing a user or leaving it ambiguous.
